name: Yoon Ha Lee
bio: Yoon Ha Lee is an American science fiction and fantasy writer, known for his Machineries of Empire space opera novels and his short fiction. His first novel, Ninefox Gambit, received the 2017 Locus Award for Best First Novel.

awards.name: Locus Award for Best First Novel
Locus Award for Best Young Adult Book
Locus Award for Best Young Adult Book
Mythopoeic Fantasy Award for Children's Literature
